faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination in Castle Hill typically costs between $350 and $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Castle Hill residents in most cases. Our team understands that mouse infestations require urgent attention, and we prioritize rapid response times throughout the Bronx.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for mouse extermination?
faqs.answer: We use a combination of proven techniques including strategic trap placement, rodent-proof exclusion work, sanitation recommendations, and safe baiting systems when necessary. Our approach focuses on both eliminating current mice and preventing future infestations.

faqs.question: Are your mouse extermination treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize the safety of your family and pets. Our technicians use EPA-approved products and methods, and we provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions. We can also offer pet-safe and child-safe treatment options upon request.
